cross_scene_arcs.title: From Victim to Agent: Jenny's Resistance and Reclamation of Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jenny evolves from a traumatized victim enduring violent abduction to an active agent reclaiming autonomy. She transitions from survival and escape to strategic resistance, emotional confrontation, and ultimately asserting control by contacting authorities and protecting the Star Man on her own terms.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jenny is violently attacked and fleeing for her life, perceiving the Star Man as a threatening invader.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jenny independently contacts law enforcement and intervenes to prevent violence against the Star Man, positioning herself as a moral authority.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her dual role as both survivor and protector creates tension with authorities, leaving her legal and emotional safety uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fractured Mirror: Identity, Grief, and the Impersonation of Scott
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jenny's emotional bond with her deceased husband, Scott, is exploited and reanimated through the Star Man's impersonation, triggering profound grief and psychological violation. Over time, this false image dissolves as a new, authentic connection forms, culminating in an unexpected maternal future rooted in alien intimacy rather than human memory.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jenny collapses in anguish upon seeing the Star Man mimic Scott's face, reliving her loss through traumatic distortion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jenny embraces a pregnancy conceived by the Star Man, symbolically replacing Scott with a new, otherworldly origin of motherhood.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The blending of grief, identity, and alien biology leaves unresolved questions about whether Jenny is healing or being further manipulated.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Stranded to United: The Evolution of a Cross-Species Alliance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jenny and the Star Man evolve from captor-captive to interdependent allies, then to intimate partners. Their bond is forged through shared survival, emotional honesty, and physical closeness, culminating in a transformative act of reproduction that transcends species boundaries.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jenny communicates the need for gas, marking the first moment of practical cooperation between her and the Star Man.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jenny accepts pregnancy from the Star Man, affirming a deep emotional and biological union despite its impossibility.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The Star Man's capacity for human emotion remains ambiguous, raising doubts about mutual understanding in their relationship.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Pursuit of Purpose: Jenny's Shift from Escape to Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jenny abandons her desire to return to normal life and instead commits fully to the Star Man's mission. She transforms into a strategist and protector, navigating roadblocks, coordinating rescues, and negotiating with authorities to ensure his survival.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jenny chooses to leave safety and rejoin the Star Man, rejecting a return to her former life.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jenny takes command during a high-stakes confrontation, directing communication with authorities to secure the Star Man's release.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her loyalty to the Star Man places her in direct conflict with human institutions, threatening her freedom and future.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Maternal Longing and the Birth of the Impossible
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jenny's unresolved grief over infertility is confronted when the Star Man impregnates her, transforming her emotional wound into a miraculous yet unsettling reality. This arc centers on the internal conflict between longing, identity, and the ethical ambiguity of an alien conception.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jenny reveals her infertility to the Star Man, exposing a deep personal vulnerability amid her efforts to help him.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jenny embraces the pregnancy, affirming her desire to become a mother despite its unnatural origin.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The implications of carrying an alien child—biologically, socially, and existentially—remain unexplored, leaving her future motherhood fraught with uncertainty.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Skeptic to Crisis Commander
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin evolves from a detached evaluator of anomalous events into an active leader of a high-stakes containment operation, gaining authority and operational responsibility as the extraterrestrial threat escalates.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Detached scientific evaluator facing unverified alien evidence
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Authorized mission commander fully engaged in search-and-contain operations
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Lacks clear ethical or strategic guidance on how to handle a sentient extraterrestrial if encountered

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Moral Descent into Command Disobedience
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin's growing empathy for the extraterrestrial entity puts him in direct conflict with command, culminating in his refusal to execute lethal orders and his ultimate break from the mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Loyal agent advocating for non-lethal containment
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Defiant operative who disobeys direct orders and severs communication with command
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The consequences of his insubordination and desertion remain unknown, as does his future role in the larger operation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Pursuit and Escalation: The Hunt for the Star Man
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin leads an intensifying manhunt to locate and contain the extraterrestrial, navigating logistical challenges, expanding jurisdictional reach, and adapting tactics as the target evades capture.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Initial identification of the extraterrestrial in human disguise with a hostage
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Implementation of a large-scale roadblock and aerial blockade to cut off escape routes
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The target remains undetected despite extensive efforts, and surveillance gaps allow continued evasion

cross_scene_arcs.title: Shifting Allegiances: Empathy Over Protocol
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin's relationship with the extraterrestrial transforms from adversarial to empathetic, influencing his decisions from negotiation to protection, ultimately redefining his loyalty from institution to individual.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Attempting peaceful negotiation with a perceived hostile entity
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Actively protecting the extraterrestrial and a civilian from lethal force
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the extraterrestrial perceives Shermin as an ally or merely another obstacle remains unclear

cross_scene_arcs.title: Operational Control vs. External Pressure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Shermin struggles to maintain strategic control over the mission amid escalating external demands, political interference, and command overreach, leading to his eventual removal and replacement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Attempting to manage containment with limited resources and expanding jurisdiction
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Stripped of command and replaced due to perceived insubordination and strategic disagreement
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The tension between field-based judgment and top-down authority remains unresolved, undermining mission cohesion

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Pursuit of Control and Escape
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Star Man struggles to maintain dominance over Jenny amid escalating resistance, shifting from physical coercion to tactical concealment while facing challenges to his authority.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Attempting to capture Jenny through force
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Maintaining control through intimidation and hidden weapons despite her resistance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Ongoing power struggle threatens the stability of his control

cross_scene_arcs.title: Cognitive Awakening and Emotional Triggers
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Star Man progresses from rote learning to meaningful comprehension of language and survival needs, yet is disrupted by unexplained emotional reactions tied to specific symbols.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Learning letters and mimicking speech without understanding
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Grasping functional knowledge like fuel necessity and showing emotional depth
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The psychological origin of his reaction to 'X' and the license plate PXV 237 remains unknown

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Captor to Companion: The Bond with Jenny
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Star Man evolves from viewing Jenny as a captive to recognizing her as a friend and emotional anchor, culminating in a bittersweet decision to leave her behind for his mission.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Insisting Jenny stay with him as a means to an end
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Choosing to depart Earth alone, emotionally transformed by their bond
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The future of their relationship and the impact on their unborn child

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Race Against Time to Return Home
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Driven by a strict deadline, Star Man navigates logistical and emotional obstacles to reach his ship, transitioning from dependence on others to determined self-reliance in his journey home.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Setting a three-day deadline to reach his ship at Lathrop Wells
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Committing to leave Earth permanently upon arrival
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether he will successfully reunite with his people or be forever changed by his Earth experience

cross_scene_arcs.title: Identity, Deception, and Belonging
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Star Man oscillates between hiding his identity and revealing his true nature, using deception for survival while moments of power and connection expose his alien essence and inner conflict about where he belongs.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Lying about being a mapmaker to blend in
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Openly embracing his extraterrestrial origin and supernatural abilities before departure
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term consequences of his exposure and the legacy of his presence on Earth
